resources.string: Find device might not work properly without permissions. Select all the listed permissions to be able to use all the features of Find device.
"\"Offline location\" isn't supported in your region."
"If you continue, you'll cancel the request to clear the lost device's data, and your phone number will no longer be displayed on its screen. Cancel request?"

"If you cancel the request to turn on Lost mode, when the device comes online it won't be locked automatically. If it has a screen lock set, this screen lock will still need to be entered to open it. Cancel request now?"
Request to clear data timed out
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
"For accessing phone number in order to locate this device when it isn't connected to the internet"
"For locating this device when it isn't connected to the internet"
For locating your device and switching to Lost mode
"This device is locked due to an overdue installment payment. Contact your sales agent for details."
This device is associated with an existing Xiaomi Account. For security reasons, you need to enter password to verify the device.
Hi! I lost this device. Could you please contact me? Thanks!
Get reminders when device goes online
Looks like %1$s is moving along with you
If your earphones are lost, nearby Xiaomi devices can work together as a network to help locate them on the map.
Turn on \"Offline location\" to be able to locate earphones.
"Couldn't clear data. Check your network settings."
"Once this action is completed, it can't be undone and all data on the device will be permanently deleted. Data that has been synced to Xiaomi Cloud will remain in the cloud."
Once the device comes online, all contacts, photos, emails, and other data (including SD cards) will be permanently deleted, and factory settings will be restored
Xiaomi Cloud sync will be turned off automatically
Send a message with your phone number to help anyone who finds your device contact you
Remove all bank cards added to Mi Pay for your financial security
The lost device may be turned off or not connected to the network. When it comes online, device data will be cleared.
"Request timed out and data hasn't been erased. The lost device hasn't yet connected to the network or is turned off. You can try to clear data again."
"After data is cleared, your phone number will appear on the lost device's Lock screen, allowing people to contact you if they find it"
If the device is online, you can still check its location via Find device.
"The request to clear data timed out, as the device hasn't been powered on or connected to the network. Try again?"
"Describe the issues you've encountered here. If you're giving suggestions, we'd appreciate more details!"
Find device took a photo remotely
A request to take a photo remotely with this device was submitted by your account
Find device is about to take a photo
Account password has been recently changed.
"By turning on Find device, you're agreeing to the "Xiaomi Cloud Privacy Policy. To withdraw your consent to the Privacy Policy, turn off this feature.
If your device is missing, you can visit i.mi.com to locate, lock, or erase data remotely.
"In order to update SIM status and make sure that all services work normally, one paid text message will be sent after you switch SIM cards. You'll be charged for this message by your carrier."

"In order to update SIM status and make sure that all services work normally, one domestic paid text message will be sent after you switch SIM cards. You'll be charged for this message by your carrier."

"In order to update SIM status and make sure that all services work normally, one international paid text message will be sent after you switch SIM cards. You'll be charged for this message by your carrier."
"Tap \"Grant\" to grant the permissions you've selected."

"With Find device, you can locate, track, and lock your device when it's missing. You can also anonymously help others locate their Xiaomi devices. This app requires the following permissions to work normally:"
"With Find device, you can locate, track, and lock your device when it's missing. This app requires the following permissions to work normally:"
"If you turn off Find device, you won't be able to locate it via this feature when it's lost or share your location with others. Turn off anyway?"
"Find device requires a Xiaomi Account to work normally. You'll be asked to set or enter a password to use this feature."
Turn on to locate and track your device or clear its data remotely. You can also anonymously help others locate their devices.
Find device storage corrupted. Your device is unsafe now.
Earphones are nearby. Tap to view details.
An item is nearby. Tap to view details.
For accessing your location via SMS when not connected to the network
"For accessing phone number in order to locate this device when it isn't connected to the internet"
"For locating this device when it isn't connected to the internet"
Turn this feature on to be able to locate and lock your device or play an alarm to help you find it.
Xiaomi Tag is nearby. Tap to view details.
"Check your device's location when it's missing"
Sign in with your Xiaomi Account and set a password to be able to locate devices.
Help friends and family members locate or lock their devices and trigger alarms
Sign in with your Xiaomi Account and set a password to be able to locate devices.
Share your real-time location with friends and family members
"Can't use %1$s due to local policies and service content restrictions."
"%1$d. Reset the Xiaomi Tag, close Find device and open it again, then connect. %2$d. In Find device, tap \"+\" to search for the device and connect again."
"%1$d. Make sure the bottom label is peeled off. %2$d. Turn on Bluetooth and connect to the network on your phone. %3$d. Keep the Xiaomi Tag close to your phone."
"Turn on \"Find this device\" to add your Xiaomi Tag. You'll be able to view location on the map and receive notifications."
"Couldn't turn on. Reset your Xiaomi Tag and try again."
This device is associated with a Xiaomi Account (%1$s, phone number: %2$s). Remove the account to be able to add the device.
This device is associated with a Xiaomi Account (%1$s). Remove the account to be able to add the device.
You can use Find device to locate devices, play sound, and receive notifications
"Can't use this name. Try a different one."
Peel off the label at the bottom of your Xiaomi Tag and hold it close to your phone
"Remove some items you don't use frequently from their details page before adding new ones."
"%1$d. Open the case and remove the battery. %2$d. Reinsert the battery, then press and hold the button for %3$d seconds. You'll hear two beeps indicating the reset is complete."

"%1$d. Open the battery compartment, remove the battery, and wait for %2$d seconds. %3$d. Reinsert the battery and make sure it's properly seated and charged. %4$d. Press and hold the button for about %5$d seconds. You'll hear beeps indicating the reset is complete."
Get reminders when your Xiaomi Tag is left behind
Display distance and direction when nearby
Show distance when the device is nearby
For helping others locate your device
An error occurred. Try again later.
Once you complete security verification, nearby Xiaomi devices can work together as a network to help locate your lost device.
Find device is unavailable in Second space. You can use it in First space.
Only display the latest %1$d days of data (Up to %2$d records)
Connect via Bluetooth to be able to play sound and get reminders on your iPhone
Some features may not be available
Allow notifications for Xiaomi Interconnectivity on your iPhone
"%1$d. Turn on Bluetooth. %2$d. Connect to the network. %3$d. Pair the device in Xiaomi Interconnectivity > Profile > Find device settings. %4$d. Accept the pairing request."
"Can't connect to the network. To view this information now, go to %s."
If you use this feature, your carrier will charge you for the SMS sent to the device. Locate now?
"This person isn't sharing their location, but can view yours"
"Couldn't turn on. Check your network settings."
The device may be powered off or not connected to the network. Lost mode will be turned on once the device comes online.
Anyone who finds your device can contact you via the message you set. Contact your carrier to report a lost SIM and change your Xiaomi Account password.
Sign in with Xiaomi Account to be able to locate via Find device.
Contact your carrier as soon as possible to report a lost SIM card, change your Xiaomi Account password, and turn on Lost mode.
The device will be locked as soon as it comes online. You can unlock it with your Xiaomi Account password.
Your device will continue to collect and display location info
Display a message with your phone number on the lost device to help anyone who finds your device contact you
Remove all bank cards added to Mi Pay for your financial security
"If you found this device, please contact me at the number on the screen. I've lost it and need it back. Thank you so much!"
"Turn this feature on when there's no available most recent location of the lost device"
Send an SMS to this number when the lost device is located
Cancel request to turn on Lost mode
The following message will be displayed on the Lock screen of the lost device to help anyone who finds it contact you.
Automatically report location info when the battery is low
Report location when battery is low
If the device is powered on and the SIM is active, try to locate via SMS
Your phone number and message will no longer be displayed.
Other people will be able to view this message via NFC and then contact you.
"This item is associated with your Xiaomi Account. Other people can't add it."
Get reminders when the item is located
Leave a message with your contact info to help anyone who finds your device contact you
"If you found this item, please call this number. I've lost it and need it back. Thank you so much!"
Anyone who finds this item can use NFC to view the following message and contact you

"To turn on Find device and Xiaomi Cloud services, %1$d paid SMS will be sent automatically. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."

"To turn on Find device and Xiaomi Cloud services, %1$d domestic paid SMS will be sent automatically. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d domestic paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."

"To turn on Find device and Xiaomi Cloud services, %1$d international paid SMS will be sent automatically. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d international paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."

"%1$d paid SMS will be sent automatically to activate this service. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."

"%1$d domestic paid SMS will be sent automatically to activate this service. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d domestic paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."
Sign in to i.mi.com with your Xiaomi Account to locate and lock your device, mark it as lost, or erase data remotely. View details here.

"%1$d international paid SMS will be sent automatically to activate this service. When you switch SIM cards, %1$d international paid SMS will be sent automatically for reactivation. All the SMS fees generated by the aforementioned actions will be collected by your carrier. Xiaomi won't charge you for these messages."
"If you remove this member, you won't be able to share your location with them anymore. Remove now?"
This name may violate our guidelines. Enter again.
This name is too long. Enter again.
Turn on \"Share my location\" on your Profile
"Couldn't connect. Move the device around or turn Bluetooth off, then turn it back on and try again."
"When Offline location is turned on, you can locate your device even if it isn't connected to the network or is powered off"

"Locate this device even when it's powered off or not connected to the network, and view the location of other offline devices.
Learn more"
Get a reminder on %2$s when %1$s is missing
"Couldn't verify. Wait a minute or two and try again."
Complete security verification to be able to locate offline devices
Find device is off on this device
"When Offline location is turned on, you can locate your device even if it's not connected to the network or is powered off. For your security, verify this device as trusted before you continue."
Verify this device as trusted to be able to turn on Offline location.
"You've added the maximum number of devices for Find device on this account. To be able to add %s, remove some other devices first."
Add tags attached to items to locate them
Device must be connected to the internet to activate. %s
Your firmware is up to date
"Don't lock the screen or leave Find device."
A firmware update is available. Tap to update.
Location history for the past week
This device is associated with a Xiaomi Account (%s). Enter password to activate device.
Replace the battery to continue using Find device
"Report location info by pressing the Power button. Location info might not be reported when network connection is poor."
This process may take up to %1$d minute…
"Can't connect to the earphones. Make sure they're nearby."
"Can't connect to this tag. Make sure it's nearby."
"Can't connect to this item. Make sure it's nearby."
"Can't connect to the watch. It may not be nearby."
Install \"Google Play Services for AR\" to use directional arrows.
Update available for \"Google Play Services for AR\". Tap to update.
Update your system to be able to use UWB for precise direction.
Grant camera permissions to be able to use this feature.
"It's too dark. Remove obstructions or turn on your flashlight."
Move around to get a more accurate direction
"You're moving too fast. Try approaching slowly."
"Sound will be played at high volume. If you're wearing headphones, continuing to do so may damage your hearing. Remove them before continuing."
"With Find device, you can locate, lock and track your device when it's missing. You can also anonymously help others locate their devices. %s"
"If you remove this device, you won't be able to locate it when it's offline."
"If you remove this device, you won't be able to locate or control it."
This item is associated with your Xiaomi Account. Removing it will allow others to add it to their accounts. Remove anyway?
"Couldn't connect to network. Wait a minute or two and try again."
"Removing this device will sign you out of it and you won't be able to locate or control it. Other people can add this device."
"%1$d. Open the case and remove the old battery. %2$d. Insert a new %4$s button cell with the \"+\" side facing up. %3$d. Close the case."
Turn on \"Offline location\" again in Mi Bunny
Unpair these earphones in Settings > Bluetooth, then pair again.
"%1$d. Open the device and remove the battery. %2$d. Reinsert the battery, then press and hold the button for %3$d seconds. You'll hear two beeps indicating the reset is complete."
Remove this device in Mi Fitness, then pair it again
"Withdrawing consent will also turn off Find device. You'll have to verify your password after you continue."
"You won't be able to continue using Find device if you withdraw permissions. Find device will be turned off as well. You'll be asked to verify your password before withdrawing."

"If you continue, you'll withdraw your consent to the Privacy Policy of Find device. The personal information already collected and retained will be deleted within the specific period in accordance with applicable laws and regulations unless required otherwise. As Find device provides its services based on the collection of the necessary personal information, your withdrawal of consent will be held as refusing to accept Find device services. Withdraw consent now?"
Report location when battery is low or before powering off
Share your location with selected people
Tap to view details, remove, or trust these items
%1$s is searching for this device. Unlock to silence.
Tap to try again or cancel.
Our updated Security Policy requires that Find device should be reactivated.
"If you turn this feature off, people you're sharing your location with will no longer be able to view it."
"Use current device's location as my location"
"Go to i.mi.com and sign in with the other person's Xiaomi Account to find their device"
"Open i.mi.com and sign in with the other person's account to locate this device"
Too many incorrect attempts. Try again later.
The owner can locate this item. Tap to view details.
These earphones are associated with another Xiaomi Account. Ask the other person to turn off Find device or unpair these earphones.
This device is associated with a Xiaomi Account (%1$s). Turn off Find device or unpair these earphones.
This device is associated with a Xiaomi Account (%1$s, phone number: %2$s). Turn off Find device or unpair these earphones.
"Can't add more trusted locations for this item. Remove some and try again."
"If you remove this location, you'll get reminders when this device is left there."
"If you continue, you won't get reminders when your devices or items are left at %s."
A network error occurred. Wait a minute or two and try again.
"Once you trust this Xiaomi Tag, you'll no longer receive notifications when it moves with your device."
"Find device is a system app. You won't be able to locate lost devices after you remove it."
The code you entered is incorrect
"Couldn't cancel request. Check your network settings."

"Keep your device connected to the network. Insert a SIM card that can be accessed normally (if supported by the device) and disconnect from the invalid Wi-Fi network.
Forgot password? Visit id.mi.com and tap \"Forgot password\" to retrieve it.
Can't activate for other reasons? Visit i.mi.com/ss and submit the necessary information to activate."

"Keep your device connected to the network. Insert a SIM card that can be accessed normally (if supported by the device) and disconnect from the invalid WLAN network.
Forgot password? Visit id.mi.com and tap \"Forgot password\" to retrieve it.
Can't activate for other reasons? Visit i.mi.com/ss and submit the necessary information to activate."
Canceled request to turn on Lost mode
The code you entered is incorrect
"Network unavailable Check your network connection and try again"
Device data will be cleared once online
Device data will be cleared once online
Will turn on Lost mode once online
"%1$d. Turn on Bluetooth. %2$d. Turn on Interconnectivity in Settings. %3$d. Connect to the network. %4$d. Keep screen on."
